review: Good service. Good food. High energy. Large portions. Low prices. I could not ask for more than this. Left work and came here for breakfast on a Friday morning, and the parking lot was surprisingly full of cars. Despite the crowd, my coworker and I were seated immediately. From the time we were seated to the time we received our meals, about 7 mins had elapsed. These people are pros who are prepped to deal with the pressure of a large crowd in a timely manner. My friend & I both got the special (2 eggs, 2 bacon, 2 sausage, 2 pancakes-$5.75) and were astonished by the size of the plates. Neither she nor I was able to finish the meal, & had to get the leftovers to go. Our waitress was full of jokes, and seemed to genuinely enjoy her job and coworkers. If you're reading this and have never eaten here, give it a shot, it's totally worth
